synopsis:
"The Line of Duty" (German title "Einsatz im Kinrah-System") is a comic strip written by Martin Fisher, drawn by Eva Widermann and edited by Gunther Nickel. The story was published in the 26th issue of the German Star Wars Rebels Magazine, which was released on December 22, 2016.
It has never received an official English translation.
title: The Line of Duty
